name: pionless-agent
description: Cross-platform research agent package. Codex ships shared research skills (with silent search/research mode auto-classification and 6 report styles including tutorial) and matching custom-agent templates (worker, verifier, drafter, writer) under ~/.codex/agents.

interface.shortDescription: Research agents with deep investigation and worker spawning
interface.longDescription: A research-agent package centered on named orchestrators and worker agents. The Codex plugin distributes reusable skills and MCP config; the installer also lays down matching custom-agent files under ~/.codex/agents so deep-research can fan out to worker and verifier agents.
defaultPrompt: Use the deep-research agent to investigate a topic and delegate worker, verifier, drafter, and writer agents.
Use the deep-research-worker agent to run a focused evidence-gathering pass on a subquestion.
Use the deep-research-verifier agent to seek contradictions in a current research thesis.
Use the deep-research-drafter agent to synthesize a finished workspace into a substantively-complete draft.
Use the deep-research-writer agent to apply craft polish to a draft and produce the final report file.
